goal: Ensure DeepSeek FIM request generation can derive prefix and suffix from a target file range, so live FIM invocation can be wired without a separate edit engine.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek fim-check --file Cargo.toml --start 4 --end 4 --max-tokens 32 --json
hidden_failure_mode: FIM can only be checked from manually provided prompt/suffix text, leaving the edit loop without a safe file-range request boundary.
